title: Naukri.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Naukri.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Naukri.com in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Naukri.com:
Naukri.com is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com!
